content: The iterative, incomplete knowledge search process that defined both 2025 ICM curiosity mechanism autonomous agent research and generic agent inquiry is itself a functional ICM curiosity loop: the open-ended search for unknown agent knowledge acts as the 'forward dynamics prediction error' that drives further refinement of agent conceptual frameworks. This recursive self-reinforcing search process can be formalized to improve how autonomous agents bootstrap their own understanding of open-ended, under-defined research problems.
